title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Mahendra's Institute - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Mahendra's Institute - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Mahendra's Institute invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mahendra's Institute:
Mahendra's Institute is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahendra's Institute!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
